title: State agencies
doc_html:
§5223. State agencies

            The provisions of this Part shall not apply to agencies of the state.

            Acts 2021, No. 281, §1.

            NOTE: See R.S. 13:5226 regarding termination of this Part on Aug. 1, 2025.
doc_text:
§5223.  State agencies
The provisions of this Part shall not apply to agencies of the state.
Acts 2021, No. 281, §1.
NOTE: See R.S. 13:5226 regarding termination of this Part on Aug. 1, 2025.
